name: M-35
events: 18 Oct 1941 M-35 attacks a group of tugs and barges with two torpedoes and gunfire off Cape Olinka. No enemy ships were sunk or damaged during this attack.
26 Oct 1941 M-35 attacks a group of barges with gunfire off Sulina, Romania. The German barge SF 25 (140 GRT) is sunk and the German barge SF 36 (140 GRT) is heavily damaged and driven ashore.
27 Oct 1941 M-35 fires two torpedoes against the German auxiliary submarine chaser Schiff 19/Lola off Sulina, Romania. Both torpedoes missed their target.
5 Sep 1942 M-35 fires two torpedoes against the Romanian merchant Suceava (6846 GRT) east of Budaki, Ukraine in position 45°54'N, 30°20'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
20 Sep 1942 M-35 fires a torpedo against what is identified as an enemy merchant of about 5000 GRT east of Zhebriyani, Ukraine in position 45°54'N, 30°21'E. The torpedo fired missed its target.

21 Sep 1942 M-35 fires a torpedo against the Bulgarian merchant Varna (2141 GRT) escorted by the Romanian torpedo boat Naluca east of Zhebriyani, Ukraine in position 45°54'N, 30°22'E. The torpedo fired missed its target.

21 Oct 1942 M-35 torpedoed and heavily damaged the small German tanker Le Progr?s (511 GRT) in position 45°08'N, 29°44'E. The heavily damaged tanker was sunk by the escorting small minesweepers R 37 and R 196.
7 Jan 1943 M-35 fires two torpedoes against the Bulgarian merchant Zar Ferdinand (1994 GRT) off Burnas, Ukraine in position 45°49'N, 30°07'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
11 Mar 1943 M-35 fires two torpedoes against a German convoy made up of several small craft south of Cape Opuk, Crimea in position 44°59'N, 36°03'E. Both torpedoes failed to hit a target.

17 Apr 1943 M-35 fires two torpedoes against a German convoy with the merchant Arkadia (1756 GRT) and several escorts 65 nautical miles east of Cape Olinka in position 44°59'N, 31°10'E. Both torpedoes failed to hit any target.
6 Aug 1943 M-35 fires two torpedoes against the German auxiliary submarine chaser UJ 116/Xanten off the Bosporus in position 41°17'N, 29°05'E.
2 Nov 1943 M-35 sank the barge SNR 1293 off Ak Mechet, Crimea in position 45°33'N, 32°42'E.
23 Nov 1943 M-35 fires two torpedoes against the German auxiliary submarine chaser UJ 101 6 nautical miles west of Ak Mechet, Crimea in position 45°32'N, 32°32'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
21 Dec 1943 M-35 fires two torpedoes against the German auxiliary submarine chaser UJ 103 west of the Crimea in position 45°15'N, 32°53'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
23 Apr 1944 M-35 fires a torpedo against the German auxiliary submarine chaser UJ 103 south-west of the Crimea in position 44°22'N, 32°25'E. the torpedo missed its target.
11 May 1944 M-35 fires two torpedoes against an enemy convoy and claims the sinking of a barge east of the Romanian coast in position 43°46'N, 29°39'E.
